item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-01)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 41018 Trending skills: 18208 Hot skills: 2191 Top All Time: find-skills (360124) Top Trending: agent-browser (14726) Top Hot: sleek-design-mobile-apps (557)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#10): swarm-planner
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #10 Installs: 56 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: [EXPLICIT INVOCATION ONLY] Creates dependency-aware implementation plans optimized for parallel multi-agent execution.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#11): llm-council
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 56 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Orchestrate a configurable, multi-member CLI planning council (Codex, Claude Code, Gemini, OpenCode, or custom) to produce independent implementation plans, anonymize and randomize them, then judge and merge into one final plan. Use when you need a robust, bias-resistant planning workflow, structured JSON outputs, retries, and failure handling across multiple CLI agents.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#12): agent browser
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #12 Installs: 56 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: A fast Rust-based headless browser automation CLI with Node.js fallback that enables AI agents to navigate, click, type, and snapshot pages via structured commands.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#13): super-swarm-spark
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 56 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Only to be triggered by explicit super-swarm-spark commands.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): parallel-task-spark
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 56 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Only to be triggered by explicit /parallel-task-spark commands.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): role-creator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 56 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create and install Codex custom agent roles in ~/.codex/config.toml, generate role config files, enforce supported keys, and guide users through required role inputs (model, reasoning effort, developer_instructions).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): codex-subagent
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 56 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Spawn Codex subagents via background shell to offload context-heavy work. Use for: deep research (3+ searches), codebase exploration (8+ files), multi-step workflows, exploratory tasks, long-running operations, documentation generation, or any other task where the intermediate steps will use large numbers of tokens.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): markdown-url
item.description:
New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 57 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Route any website you need to visit through markdown.new by prefixing the URL.
**WHEN TO USE:** - You would normally open a website link to read content (docs, blog posts, changelogs, GitHub issues, etc.) - You need a cleaner, Markdown-friendly view for copying notes or summarizing

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#18): gemini-computer-use
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #18 Installs: 56 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Build and run Gemini 2.5 Computer Use browser-control agents with Playwright. Use when a user wants to automate web browser tasks via the Gemini Computer Use model, needs an agent loop (screenshot → function_call → action → function_response), or asks to integrate safety confirmation for risky UI actions.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#2): frontend-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #2 Installs: 58 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): ralph
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Self-referential completion loop for AI CLI tools. Re-runs the agent on the same task across turns with fresh context each iteration, until the completion promise is detected or max iterations is reached.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): code-review
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Conduct thorough, constructive code reviews for quality and security. Use when reviewing pull requests, checking code quality, identifying bugs, or auditing security. Handles best practices, SOLID principles, security vulnerabilities, performance analysis, and testing coverage.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): bmad-orchestrator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Orchestrates BMAD workflows for structured AI-driven development. Routes work across Analysis, Planning, Solutioning, and Implementation phases.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#3): vercel-react-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #3 Installs: 57 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): backend-testing
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Write comprehensive backend tests including unit tests, integration tests, and API tests. Use when testing REST APIs, database operations, authentication flows, or business logic. Handles Jest, Pytest, Mocha, testing strategies, mocking, and test coverage.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): data-analysis
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 53 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Analyze datasets to extract insights, identify patterns, and generate reports. Use when exploring data, creating visualizations, or performing statistical analysis. Handles CSV, JSON, SQL queries, and Python pandas operations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): prompt-repetition
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 50 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: LLM 정확도 향상을 위한 프롬프트 반복 기법. 70개 벤치마크 중 67%(47/70)에서 유의미한 성능 향상 달성. 경량 모델(haiku, flash, mini)에서 자동 적용.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): vibe-kanban
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 50 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: AI 코딩 에이전트를 시각적 Kanban 보드에서 관리. To Do→In Progress→Review→Done 흐름으로 병렬 에이전트 실행, git worktree 자동 격리, GitHub PR 자동 생성.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#4): plan-harder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #4 Installs: 57 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Use when user specfically says 'plan harder'.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): genkit
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 50 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Build production-ready AI workflows using Firebase Genkit. Use when creating flows, tool-calling agents, RAG pipelines, multi-agent systems, or deploying AI to Firebase/Cloud Run. Supports TypeScript, Go, and Python with Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, and Vertex AI plugins.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): pollinations-ai
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 50 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Generate and save images using Pollinations.ai's free, open-source API. No signup required. Supports URL-based generation, custom parameters (width, height, model, seed), and automatic file saving. Perfect for quick prototypes, marketing assets, and creative workflows.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#6): planner
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #6 Installs: 57 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create comprehensive, phased implementation plans with sprints and atomic tasks. Use when user says: "make a plan", "create a plan", "plan this out", "plan the implementation", "help me plan", "design a plan", "draft a plan", "write a plan", "outline the steps", "break this down into tasks", "what's the plan for", or any similar planning request. Also triggers on explicit "/planner" or "/plan" commands.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#7): context7
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #7 Installs: 56 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Fetch up-to-date library documentation via Context7 API. Use PROACTIVELY when: (1) Working with ANY external library (React, Next.js, Supabase, etc.) (2) User asks about library APIs, patterns, or best practices (3) Implementing features that rely on third-party packages (4) Debugging library-specific issues (5) Need current documentation beyond training data cutoff (6) AND MOST IMPORTANTLY, when you are installing dependencies, libraries, or frameworks you should ALWAYS check the docs to see what the latest versions are. Do not rely on outdated knowledge. Always prefer this over guessing library APIs or using outdated knowledge.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#8): read-github
item.description:
New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #8 Installs: 56 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Read and search GitHub repository documentation via gitmcp.io MCP service.
**WHEN TO USE:** - User provides a GitHub URL - User mentions a specific repo in owner/repo format - User asks "what does this repo do?", "read the docs for X repo", or similar - User wants to search code or docs within a repo

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#9): openai-docs-skill
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #9 Installs: 56 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Query the OpenAI developer documentation via the OpenAI Docs MCP server using CLI (curl/jq). Use whenever a task involves the OpenAI API (Responses, Chat Completions, Realtime, etc.), OpenAI SDKs, ChatGPT Apps SDK, Codex, MCP integrations, endpoint schemas, parameters, limits, or migrations and you need up-to-date official guidance.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#47): skill-creator
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 1331 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#48): vercel-composition-patterns
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 1315 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: React composition patterns that scale. Use when refactoring components with boolean prop proliferation, building flexible component libraries, or designing reusable APIs. Triggers on tasks involving compound components, render props, context providers, or component architecture.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (10 → 41): authentication-setup
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #10 Current rank: #41 Delta: -31 Installs: 50 (prev 52) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and implement authentication and authorization systems. Use when setting up user login, JWT tokens, OAuth, session management, or role-based access control. Handles password security, token management, SSO integration.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (11 → 42): sprint-retrospective
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #11 Current rank: #42 Delta: -31 Installs: 50 (prev 52) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Facilitate effective sprint retrospectives for continuous team improvement. Use when conducting team retrospectives, identifying improvements, or fostering team collaboration. Handles retrospective formats, action items, and facilitation techniques.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (12 → 43): frontend-design-system
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #12 Current rank: #43 Delta: -31 Installs: 50 (prev 52) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Produce production-grade UI designs using clear design tokens, layout rules, motion guidance, and accessibility checks for consistent, scalable frontend development.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (13 → 23): system-environment-setup
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #13 Current rank: #23 Delta: -10 Installs: 51 (prev 52) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Configure development and production environments for consistent and reproducible setups. Use when setting up new projects, Docker environments, or development tooling. Handles Docker Compose, .env configuration, dev containers, and infrastructure as code.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (14 → 37): api-documentation
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #14 Current rank: #37 Delta: -23 Installs: 50 (prev 52) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Create comprehensive API documentation for developers. Use when documenting REST APIs, GraphQL schemas, or SDK methods. Handles OpenAPI/Swagger, interactive docs, examples, and API reference guides.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (15 → 45): testing-strategies
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #15 Current rank: #45 Delta: -30 Installs: 50 (prev 52) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design comprehensive testing strategies for software quality assurance. Use when planning test coverage, implementing test pyramids, or setting up testing infrastructure. Handles unit testing, integration testing, E2E testing, TDD, and testing best practices.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (3 → 19): pptx-presentation-builder
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #3 Current rank: #19 Delta: -16 Installs: 55 (prev 55) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Build professional PPTX presentations with brand-aligned layouts using structured deck briefs and validation steps for pitch, roadmap, and product decks.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (38 → 48): standup-meeting
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #38 Current rank: #48 Delta: -10 Installs: 50 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Conduct effective daily standup meetings for agile teams. Use when facilitating standups, tracking blockers, or improving team synchronization. Handles standup format, time management, and blocker resolution.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (39 → 49): marketing-skills-collection
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #39 Current rank: #49 Delta: -10 Installs: 50 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Generate marketing deliverables across CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth using 23 specialized sub-skills with clear objectives, constraints, and validation.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (5 → 20): technical-writing
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #5 Current rank: #20 Delta: -15 Installs: 53 (prev 53) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Write clear, comprehensive technical documentation. Use when creating specs, architecture docs, runbooks, or API documentation. Handles technical specifications, system design docs, operational guides, and developer documentation with industry best practices.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (6 → 50): remotion-video-production
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #6 Current rank: #50 Delta: -44 Installs: 50 (prev 53) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Produce programmable videos with Remotion using scene planning, asset orchestration, and validation gates for automated, brand-consistent video content.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (7 → 21): file-organization
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #7 Current rank: #21 Delta: -14 Installs: 51 (prev 52) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Organize project files and folders for maintainability and scalability. Use when structuring new projects, refactoring folder structure, or establishing conventions. Handles project structure, naming conventions, and file organization best practices.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (9 → 38): agentic-workflow
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #9 Current rank: #38 Delta: -29 Installs: 50 (prev 52) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: AI 에이전트 실전 워크플로우와 생산성 기법. 명령어, 단축키, Git 통합, MCP 활용, 세션 관리 등 일상 개발 작업의 최적화 패턴 제공.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (33 → 5): parallel-task
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #33 Current rank: #5 Delta: +28 Installs: 57 (prev 63) Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Execute plan files by launching multiple parallel subagents to complete tasks simultaneously. Triggers on explicit "/parallel-task" commands.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (45 → 28): git-workflow
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #45 Current rank: #28 Delta: +17 Installs: 51 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Manage Git workflows including commits, branches, merges, and collaboration. Use when working with Git repositories, creating commits, managing branches, or resolving conflicts.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (49 → 30): vercel-react-best-practices
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #49 Current rank: #30 Delta: +19 Installs: 51 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (2 → 4): twitter-automation
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #2 Current rank: #4 Delta: -2 Installs: 14517 (prev 15260) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Automate Twitter/X with posting, engagement, and user management via inference.sh CLI. Apps: x/post-tweet, x/post-create (with media), x/post-like, x/post-retweet, x/dm-send, x/user-follow. Capabilities: post tweets, schedule content, like posts, retweet, send DMs, follow users, get profiles. Use for: social media automation, content scheduling, engagement bots, audience growth, X API. Triggers: twitter api, x api, tweet automation, post to twitter, twitter bot, social media automation, x automation, tweet scheduler, twitter integration, post tweet, twitter post, x post, send tweet

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (4 → 5): remotion-render
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #4 Current rank: #5 Delta: -1 Installs: 14487 (prev 15206) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Render videos from React/Remotion component code via inference.sh. Pass TSX code, get MP4. Supports all Remotion APIs: useCurrentFrame, useVideoConfig, spring, interpolate, AbsoluteFill, Sequence. Configurable resolution, FPS, duration, codec. Use for: programmatic video generation, animated graphics, motion design, data-driven videos, React animations to video. Triggers: remotion, render video from code, tsx to video, react video, programmatic video, remotion render, code to video, animated video, motion graphics code, react animation video

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (5 → 6): nano-banana-2
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #5 Current rank: #6 Delta: -1 Installs: 14482 (prev 15196) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Generate images with Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview (Nano Banana 2) via inference.sh CLI. Capabilities: text-to-image, image editing, multi-image input (up to 14 images), Google Search grounding. Triggers: nano banana 2, nanobanana 2, gemini 3.1 flash image, gemini 3 1 flash image preview, google image generation

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (9 → 10): find-skills
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #9 Current rank: #10 Delta: -1 Installs: 8939 (prev 9637) Source: vercel-labs/skills Description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

item.title: [Trending] Rank up (10 → 9): sleek-design-mobile-apps
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #10 Current rank: #9 Delta: +1 Installs: 11837 (prev 9592) Source: sleekdotdesign/agent-skills Description: Use when the user wants to design a mobile app, create screens, build UI, or interact with their Sleek projects. Covers high-level requests ("design an app that does X") and specific ones ("list my projects", "create a new project", "screenshot that screen").

item.title: [Trending] Rank up (23 → 20): azure-rbac
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #23 Current rank: #20 Delta: +3 Installs: 3770 (prev 3915) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Helps users find the right Azure RBAC role for an identity with least privilege access, then generate CLI commands and Bicep code to assign it. USE FOR: "what role should I assign", "least privilege role", "RBAC role for", "role to read blobs", "role for managed identity", "custom role definition", "assign role to identity". DO NOT USE FOR: creating or configuring managed identities, or general Azure security hardening; those are out of scope for this role-selection skill.

item.title: [Trending] Rank up (3 → 2): ai-video-generation
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #3 Current rank: #2 Delta: +1 Installs: 14586 (prev 15219) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Generate AI videos with Google Veo, Seedance, Wan, Grok and 40+ models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Veo 3.1, Veo 3, Seedance 1.5 Pro, Wan 2.5, Grok Imagine Video, OmniHuman, Fabric, HunyuanVideo. Capabilities: text-to-video, image-to-video, lipsync, avatar animation, video upscaling, foley sound. Use for: social media videos, marketing content, explainer videos, product demos, AI avatars. Triggers: video generation, ai video, text to video, image to video, veo, animate image, video from image, ai animation, video generator, generate video, t2v, i2v, ai video maker, create video with ai, runway alternative, pika alternative, sora alternative, kling alternative
